changes.rawTitle: Plugins/uninstall: remove tracked managed plugin install directories even when the persisted install path differs from the default id-derived target, while still refusing deletes outside the managed extensions root. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/update: restore previous plugin index records if core update or channel setup hits a concurrent config write conflict after plugin metadata changes. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/onboarding: defer channel/provider 插件 install records until the owning 配置 write commits, keeping setup failures 从 advancing the 插件 index ahead 的 `openclaw.json`. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/config: defer shipped `plugins.installs` index migration during config writes until the guarded config commit window and roll it back if the config write fails before commit. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.rawTitle: Sessions: keep embedded runtime context out of the visible user prompt by sending it as a hidden next-turn custom message, and teach doctor to repair affected 2026.4.24 transcripts with duplicated prompt-rewrite branches. Fixes #71761.

changes.rawTitle: Gateway/subagents: keep direct-loopback backend RPCs authenticated with the shared gateway token/password off stale CLI paired-device scope baselines, so internal calls no longer hit `scope-upgrade` pairing prompts while remote, browser, node, device-token, and explicit-device paths still require normal pairing approval. Fixes #63548.

changes.title: Providers/Azure OpenAI: give deployment-scoped image generation requests a longer 600s default 超时 so slow `gpt-image-2` generations can complete 不适用 a per-call `timeoutMs`. 修复 #71705. Thanks @voytas75.

changes.rawTitle: Gateway/plugins: link source-checkout bundled runtime dependency caches instead of recursively copying `node_modules` on the gateway main thread, preventing local status, node, and skill probes from timing out during startup cache restores.

changes.rawTitle: Skills/remote nodes: recognize `system.which` object-map responses when probing connected macOS nodes, so Linux gateways can expose macOS-only skills such as Apple Notes when the required binaries are installed remotely. Fixes #71877. Thanks @miguelarios.

changes.rawTitle: CLI/plugins: keep `message` startup, `channels logs`, `agents delete`, and `agents set-identity` off broad plugin preloading; message delivery still loads plugins when the action actually runs.

changes.title: Sessions: separate reset freshness 从 session-store `updatedAt`, so heartbeat, cron, exec, 和 网关 bookkeeping no longer 防止 configured daily/idle resets 从 rolling long-running channel sessions. 修复 #68315, #63732, #63820, 和 #69083. Thanks @maxatv, @longhairedsi, @bradfreels, 和 @akessel56.
changes.rawTitle: Sessions: separate reset freshness from session-store `updatedAt`, so heartbeat, cron, exec, and gateway bookkeeping no longer prevent configured daily/idle resets from rolling long-running channel sessions. changes.title: Sessions: clear queued system-event notices 期间 `/new`, `/reset`, 网关 `sessions.reset`, 和 daily/idle rollover so stale background updates cannot leak 进入 the first prompt 的 the fresh session. 修复 #66864. Thanks @opeyio, @Magicray1217, 和 @cedillarack.

changes.rawTitle: Windows/native: keep CLI startup and bundled provider plugin loading off Windows ESM raw-path failure paths, fixing native onboarding/install smoke on Node 24.

changes.rawTitle: Diagnostics/trace: report live context usage from the current prompt snapshot instead of provider turn totals, avoiding false near-full context spikes on cached or tool-heavy runs.

changes.title: Providers/onboarding: keep Runway 和 Alibaba 模型 Studio out 的 the text-inference setup picker 通过 scoping their video-generation 认证 choices to the media setup flow. (#65856) Thanks @Jah-yee.

changes.title: 插件/Bonjour: 停止 the 网关 从 崩溃-looping 在 `CIAO PROBING CANCELLED` 当 the mDNS watchdog cancels a stuck probe. Restores the rejection-handler wiring dropped 期间 the bonjour 插件 migration 和 shares unhandled-rejection state across module instances so 插件-staged copies 的 `openclaw/插件-sdk/runtime` register 进入 the same handler set the host consults. Especially affects Docker 在 macOS, where mDNS probing reliably hits the watchdog. Thanks @troyhitch.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/Bonjour: stop the gateway from crash-looping on `CIAO PROBING CANCELLED` when the mDNS watchdog cancels a stuck probe. Restores the rejection-handler wiring dropped during the bonjour plugin migration and shares unhandled-rejection state across module instances so plugin-staged copies of `openclaw/plugin-sdk/runtime` register into the same handler set the host consults. Especially affects Docker on macOS, where mDNS probing reliably hits the watchdog. Thanks @troyhitch.

changes.title: Google Meet: report pinned Chrome nodes as offline 或 missing capabilities 在 setup/join diagnostics, keep inaccessible nodes out 的 auto-selection, 和 preflight local BlackHole/SoX requirements 之前 Agent try local Chrome.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: report pinned Chrome nodes as offline or missing capabilities in setup/join diagnostics, keep inaccessible nodes out of auto-selection, and preflight local BlackHole/SoX requirements before agents try local Chrome.

items.title: 网关/services: refuse process 和 service mutations 从 an older OpenClaw binary 当 the 配置 was last written 通过 a newer version, preventing split-brain installs 从 stopping 或 rewriting newer 网关 services. 修复 #57079.

items.title: 网关: reserve `/healthz` 和 `/readyz` ahead 的 插件, canvas, 和 Control 界面 HTTP stages so liveness/readiness probes still answer 当 a later route handler stalls. 修复 #69674. Thanks @Xike-Creek.

items.title: 插件/Bonjour: 停止 the 网关 从 崩溃-looping 在 `CIAO PROBING CANCELLED` 当 the mDNS watchdog cancels a stuck probe. Restores the rejection-handler wiring dropped 期间 the bonjour 插件 migration 和 shares unhandled-rejection state across module instances so 插件-staged copies 的 `openclaw/插件-sdk/runtime` register 进入 the same handler set the host consults. Especially affects Docker 在 macOS, where mDNS probing reliably hits the watchdog. Thanks @troyhitch.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/Bonjour: stop the gateway from crash-looping on `CIAO PROBING CANCELLED` when the mDNS watchdog cancels a stuck probe. Restores the rejection-handler wiring dropped during the bonjour plugin migration and shares unhandled-rejection state across module instances so plugin-staged copies of `openclaw/plugin-sdk/runtime` register into the same handler set the host consults. Especially affects Docker on macOS, where mDNS probing reliably hits the watchdog. Thanks @troyhitch.

changes.title: ACPX/Droid: 添加 Factory Droid to the live ACP bind Docker matrix, including `.factory` settings staging, `FACTORY_API_KEY` forwarding, 和 the single-Agent `test:docker:live-acp-bind:droid` recipe.
changes.rawTitle: ACPX/Droid: add Factory Droid to the live ACP bind Docker matrix, including `.factory` settings staging, `FACTORY_API_KEY` forwarding, and the single-agent `test:docker:live-acp-bind:droid` recipe.

changes.title: TTS/personas: 添加 provider-aware TTS personas 使用 deterministic provider binding merges, `/tts persona` controls, 网关/CLI persona state, Google Gemini `audio-profile-v1` prompt wrapping, 和 OpenAI instruction mapping. (#70748) Thanks @barronlroth.
changes.rawTitle: TTS/personas: add provider-aware TTS personas with deterministic provider binding merges, `/tts persona` controls, gateway/CLI persona state, Google Gemini `audio-profile-v1` prompt wrapping, and OpenAI instruction mapping. (#70748) Thanks @barronlroth.

changes.title: 语音 Wake: 添加 trigger-based routing so macOS 语音 wake phrases can select a configured Agent 或 session target, 使用 网关 routing APIs 和 node 更新 events. (#30354) Thanks @longbiaochen.
changes.rawTitle: Voice Wake: add trigger-based routing so macOS voice wake phrases can select a configured agent or session target, with Gateway routing APIs and node update events. (#30354) Thanks @longbiaochen.

changes.title: 插件/CLI: let flag-driven `openclaw channels 添加` install the selected channel 插件 从 its default source 不适用 opening an interactive prompt, fixing published npm Telegram setup 在 stdin-closed automation. Thanks @Codex.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/CLI: let flag-driven `openclaw channels add` install the selected channel plugin from its default source without opening an interactive prompt, fixing published npm Telegram setup in stdin-closed automation. Thanks @codex.

changes.title: 插件/startup: load the default `内存-core` slot 期间 网关 startup 当 permitted so active-内存 recall can call `memory_search` 和 `memory_get` 不适用 requiring an explicit `插件.slots.内存` entry, while preserving `插件.slots.内存: "none"`. Thanks @Codex.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/startup: load the default `memory-core` slot during Gateway startup when permitted so active-memory recall can call `memory_search` and `memory_get` without requiring an explicit `plugins.slots.memory` entry, while preserving `plugins.slots.memory: "none"`. Thanks @codex.

changes.title: 插件/CLI: prefer native require 为了 compiled bundled 插件 JavaScript 之前 jiti so read-only 配置, status, device, 和 node commands 避免 unnecessary transform overhead 在 slow hosts. 修复 #62842. Thanks @Effet.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/CLI: prefer native require for compiled bundled plugin JavaScript before jiti so read-only config, status, device, and node commands avoid unnecessary transform overhead on slow hosts. Fixes #62842. Thanks @Effet.

changes.title: 插件/compat: inventory 诊断工具-side deprecation migrations separately 从 runtime 插件 compatibility so release sweeps 保留 needed repairs while enforcing dated removal Windows. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/compat: inventory doctor-side deprecation migrations separately from runtime plugin compatibility so release sweeps preserve needed repairs while enforcing dated removal windows. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/compat: 添加 missing dated compatibility records 为了 legacy extension-API, 内存 registration, provider hook/type aliases, runtime aliases, channel SDK helpers, 和 approval/test utility shims. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/compat: add missing dated compatibility records for legacy extension-api, memory registration, provider hook/type aliases, runtime aliases, channel SDK helpers, and approval/test utility shims. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/CLI: refresh the persisted registry 之后 managed 插件 files are removed so ClawHub uninstall cannot leave stale `插件 list` entries. Thanks @Codex.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/CLI: refresh the persisted registry after managed plugin files are removed so ClawHub uninstall cannot leave stale `plugins list` entries. Thanks @codex.

changes.title: 插件/CLI: make 插件 install 和 uninstall 配置 writes conflict-aware, clear stale denylist entries 在 explicit reinstall/removal, 和 delete managed 插件 files only 之后 配置/index commit succeeds. Thanks @Codex.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/CLI: make plugin install and uninstall config writes conflict-aware, clear stale denylist entries on explicit reinstall/removal, and delete managed plugin files only after config/index commit succeeds. Thanks @codex.

changes.title: 插件: fail `插件 更新` 当 tracked 插件 或 hook updates 错误, keep bundled runtime-dependency repair behind restrictive allowlists, 和 reject package installs 使用 unloadable extension entries. Thanks @Codex.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins: fail `plugins update` when tracked plugin or hook updates error, keep bundled runtime-dependency repair behind restrictive allowlists, and reject package installs with unloadable extension entries. Thanks @codex.

changes.title: 网关/chat: keep duplicate attachment-backed `chat.send` retries 使用 the same idempotency 密钥 在 the documented 在-flight 路径 so aborts still target the real active run. 修复 #70139. Thanks @Feelw00.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/chat: keep duplicate attachment-backed `chat.send` retries with the same idempotency key on the documented in-flight path so aborts still target the real active run. Fixes #70139. Thanks @Feelw00.

changes.title: 插件: share package entrypoint resolution 之间 install 和 discovery, reject mismatched `runtimeExtensions`, 和 cache bundled runtime-dependency manifest reads 期间 scans. Thanks @Codex.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins: share package entrypoint resolution between install and discovery, reject mismatched `runtimeExtensions`, and cache bundled runtime-dependency manifest reads during scans. Thanks @codex.

changes.title: Onboarding/setup: keep first-run 配置 reads, 插件 compatibility notices, 和 post-模型 sanity checks 在 cold metadata paths unless the user chooses to browse all 模型, avoiding full 插件/runtime catalog work 之间 prompts. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Onboarding/setup: keep first-run config reads, plugin compatibility notices, and post-model sanity checks on cold metadata paths unless the user chooses to browse all models, avoiding full plugin/runtime catalog work between prompts. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: Onboarding/认证: run manifest-owned provider 认证 choices through scoped setup providers so selecting OpenAI Codex 浏览器/device 认证 no longer loads every provider runtime 之前 OAuth认证 starts. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Onboarding/auth: run manifest-owned provider auth choices through scoped setup providers so selecting OpenAI Codex browser/device auth no longer loads every provider runtime before OAuth starts. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: Onboarding/认证: keep the post-认证 default-模型 policy lookup 在 manifest/setup metadata so the next prompt appears 不适用 loading broad provider runtime. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Onboarding/auth: keep the post-auth default-model policy lookup on manifest/setup metadata so the next prompt appears without loading broad provider runtime. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: Onboarding/模型: keep skip-认证 和 provider-scoped 模型 picker prompts off the full global 模型 catalog 路径, 和 cache provider catalog hook resolution so setup no longer stalls 之后 认证 在 large 插件 registries. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Onboarding/models: keep skip-auth and provider-scoped model picker prompts off the full global model catalog path, and cache provider catalog hook resolution so setup no longer stalls after auth on large plugin registries. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 网关/Bonjour: suppress known @homebridge/ciao cancellation 和 network assertion failures through scoped process handlers so malformed mDNS packets 或 restricted VPS networking 禁用/restart Bonjour 而不是 crashing the 网关. 修复 #67578. Thanks @zenassist26-create.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/Bonjour: suppress known @homebridge/ciao cancellation and network assertion failures through scoped process handlers so malformed mDNS packets or restricted VPS networking disable/restart Bonjour instead of crashing the gateway. Fixes #67578. Thanks @zenassist26-create.

changes.title: Discord: keep late clicks 在 already-resolved exec approval buttons quiet 当 elevated mode auto-resolved the request, while still surfacing real approval submission failures. 修复 #66906. Thanks @rlerikse.
changes.rawTitle: Discord: keep late clicks on already-resolved exec approval buttons quiet when elevated mode auto-resolved the request, while still surfacing real approval submission failures. Fixes #66906. Thanks @rlerikse.

changes.title: Agent/subagents: deliver completed yielded-subagent results back to no-thread requester routes via direct fallback 当 the dormant parent announce turn produces no visible reply, 和 添加 QA-lab coverage 为了 the regression. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/subagents: deliver completed yielded-subagent results back to no-thread requester routes via direct fallback when the dormant parent announce turn produces no visible reply, and add QA-lab coverage for the regression. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/Tailscale: let Tailscale-authenticated Control 界面 operator sessions 使用 浏览器 device identity skip the device-pairing round trip while still rejecting device-less 和 node-role connections. Refs #71986. Thanks @jokedul.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/Tailscale: let Tailscale-authenticated Control UI operator sessions with browser device identity skip the device-pairing round trip while still rejecting device-less and node-role connections. Refs #71986. Thanks @jokedul.

changes.title: 诊断工具: honor `OPENCLAW_SERVICE_REPAIR_POLICY=external` 通过 reporting 网关 service health while skipping service install/start/restart/bootstrap, supervisor rewrites, 和 legacy service cleanup 为了 externally managed environments. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor: honor `OPENCLAW_SERVICE_REPAIR_POLICY=external` by reporting gateway service health while skipping service install/start/restart/bootstrap, supervisor rewrites, and legacy service cleanup for externally managed environments. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: CLI/更新: run package post-更新 诊断工具 使用 `--修复` so package updates repair 配置 migrations 之前 restart. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/update: run package post-update doctor with `--fix` so package updates repair config migrations before restart. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: CLI/更新: 重试 failed npm global updates 使用 `--omit=optional` 和 ignore the superseded first failure 当 the fallback succeeds. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/update: retry failed npm global updates with `--omit=optional` and ignore the superseded first failure when the fallback succeeds. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/uninstall: migrate 和 reset `插件.slots.contextEngine` alongside 内存 slots 当 插件 ids 更改 或 selected 插件 are removed. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/uninstall: migrate and reset `plugins.slots.contextEngine` alongside memory slots when plugin ids change or selected plugins are removed. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: Agent/Discord: keep raw `Agent failed 之前 reply` runner failures out 的 Discord group/channel chats 和 show detailed runner errors 在 direct chats only 当 `/verbose` is enabled. Thanks @Codex.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Discord: keep raw `Agent failed before reply` runner failures out of Discord group/channel chats and show detailed runner errors in direct chats only when `/verbose` is enabled. Thanks @codex.

changes.title: 界面/Windows: quote resolved pnpm `.cmd` launcher paths 之前 spawning 界面 install/build/test commands so Node installs under `C:\Program Files` no longer fail as `C:\Program`. 修复 #45275. Thanks @Kobevictor, @stoppieboy, 和 @iubns.
changes.rawTitle: UI/Windows: quote resolved pnpm `.cmd` launcher paths before spawning UI install/build/test commands so Node installs under `C:\Program Files` no longer fail as `C:\Program`. Fixes #45275. Thanks @Kobevictor, @stoppieboy, and @iubns.

changes.title: Codex/Agent: translate `--thinking minimal` to `low` 为了 modern Codex 模型 (gpt-5.5, gpt-5.4, gpt-5.4-mini, gpt-5.2) at request build time so the first turn is accepted 而不是 paying a wasted call + 重试-使用-low fallback. Older Codex 模型 still receive `minimal` directly. 修复 #71946. Thanks @hclsys.
changes.rawTitle: Codex/agent: translate `--thinking minimal` to `low` for modern Codex models (gpt-5.5, gpt-5.4, gpt-5.4-mini, gpt-5.2) at request build time so the first turn is accepted instead of paying a wasted call + retry-with-low fallback. Older Codex models still receive `minimal` directly. Fixes #71946. Thanks @hclsys.

changes.title: 插件/uninstall: 移除 tracked 插件 files 从 their recorded managed extensions root even 当 the current state directory points somewhere else, so `openclaw 插件 uninstall --force` does not leave the 插件 discoverable. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/uninstall: remove tracked plugin files from their recorded managed extensions root even when the current state directory points somewhere else, so `openclaw plugins uninstall --force` does not leave the plugin discoverable. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: Agent/runtime: 添加 `agentRuntime.id` as the canonical 配置 密钥, migrate legacy runtime-policy configs 使用 `openclaw 诊断工具 --修复`, route canonical Anthropic 模型 through `claude-CLI` 不适用 passing CLI backend aliases to embedded harness selection, 和 load CLI backend owner 插件 之前 channel startup. 修复 #71957. Thanks @WolvenRA.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/runtime: add `agentRuntime.id` as the canonical config key, migrate legacy runtime-policy configs with `openclaw doctor --fix`, route canonical Anthropic models through `claude-cli` without passing CLI backend aliases to embedded harness selection, and load CLI backend owner plugins before channel startup. Fixes #71957. Thanks @WolvenRA.

changes.title: CLI/更新: guard Windows scheduled-task stops 通过 state 和 超时 so auto-更新 restart cannot hang indefinitely 在 `schtasks /End` 之前 stale-listener cleanup. 修复 #69970. Thanks @yangswld 和 @sherlock-huang.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/update: guard Windows scheduled-task stops by state and timeout so auto-update restart cannot hang indefinitely on `schtasks /End` before stale-listener cleanup. Fixes #69970. Thanks @yangswld and @sherlock-huang.

changes.title: Windows install/Lobster: execute `pnpm.exe` directly 当 `npm_execpath` points at the native pnpm binary, 添加 an installed-package fallback 为了 the Lobster embedded runtime, 和 include the Lobster runner regression test 在 Windows CI. 修复 #69456. Thanks @igormf.
changes.rawTitle: Windows install/Lobster: execute `pnpm.exe` directly when `npm_execpath` points at the native pnpm binary, add an installed-package fallback for the Lobster embedded runtime, and include the Lobster runner regression test in Windows CI. Fixes #69456. Thanks @igormf.

changes.title: 网关/install: refresh loaded 网关 service installs 当 the current service embeds stale 网关 认证 而不是 returning already-installed, avoiding LaunchAgent 令牌-mismatch loops 之后 令牌 rotation. 修复 #70752. Thanks @hyspacex.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/install: refresh loaded gateway service installs when the current service embeds stale gateway auth instead of returning already-installed, avoiding LaunchAgent token-mismatch loops after token rotation. Fixes #70752. Thanks @hyspacex.

changes.title: 更新: ignore bundled 插件 `.openclaw-install-stage` directories 期间 global install verification 和 packaged dist pruning so leftover runtime-dep staging files do not turn successful updates 进入 `unexpected packaged dist file` failures. 修复 #71752. Thanks @waynegault.
changes.rawTitle: Update: ignore bundled plugin `.openclaw-install-stage` directories during global install verification and packaged dist pruning so leftover runtime-dep staging files do not turn successful updates into `unexpected packaged dist file` failures. Fixes #71752. Thanks @waynegault.

changes.title: CLI/更新: fail package updates 当 post-更新 插件 sync fails 和 refresh legacy npm 插件 install records 之前 trusting unchanged artifacts, preventing successful updates 从 restarting 使用 stale 或 failed 插件 state. Thanks @vincentkoc 和 @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/update: fail package updates when post-update plugin sync fails and refresh legacy npm plugin install records before trusting unchanged artifacts, preventing successful updates from restarting with stale or failed plugin state. Thanks @vincentkoc and @shakkernerd.

changes.title: Release/更新: reject pre-populated bundled 插件 `.openclaw-install-stage` directories, including mixed-case 路径 variants, 之前 package inventory generation so release tarballs cannot ship poisoned runtime-dependency staging debris. 修复 #71752. Thanks @hclsys.
changes.rawTitle: Release/update: reject pre-populated bundled plugin `.openclaw-install-stage` directories, including mixed-case path variants, before package inventory generation so release tarballs cannot ship poisoned runtime-dependency staging debris. Fixes #71752. Thanks @hclsys.

changes.title: Node runtime: keep node-host 重试 timers alive across 网关 restarts 和 exit 在 terminal credential pauses so supervised nodes do not become silent zombies. 修复 #69800. Thanks @meroli28.
changes.rawTitle: Node runtime: keep node-host retry timers alive across Gateway restarts and exit on terminal credential pauses so supervised nodes do not become silent zombies. Fixes #69800. Thanks @meroli28.

changes.title: 网关/插件: 停止 persisted WhatsApp 认证 state 从 activating bundled channel runtime-dependency repair 期间 startup 当 `channels.WhatsApp` is absent, avoiding npm/git stalls 在 packaged Linux installs. 修复 #71994. Thanks @xiao398008.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/plugins: stop persisted WhatsApp auth state from activating bundled channel runtime-dependency repair during startup when `channels.whatsapp` is absent, avoiding npm/git stalls on packaged Linux installs. Fixes #71994. Thanks @xiao398008.

changes.title: 网关/device tokens: enforce caller-scope containment inside 令牌 rotation 和 revocation so pairing-only sessions cannot mutate higher-scope operator tokens. 修复 #71990. Thanks @coygeek.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/device tokens: enforce caller-scope containment inside token rotation and revocation so pairing-only sessions cannot mutate higher-scope operator tokens. Fixes #71990. Thanks @coygeek.

changes.title: 插件/channels: keep 安全 checks, thread-binding placement, provider summaries, health formatting, 和 message action labels 在 read-only 或 already-loaded channel metadata 而不是 importing full channel runtime. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/channels: keep security checks, thread-binding placement, provider summaries, health formatting, and message action labels on read-only or already-loaded channel metadata instead of importing full channel runtime. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/status: keep 配置-only channel labels 和 status 安全 summaries 从 importing 插件 runtime modules just to render metadata. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/status: keep config-only channel labels and status security summaries from importing plugin runtime modules just to render metadata. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: Sessions/channels: 停止 group-session metadata 从 loading bundled channel runtime just to classify `#channel` subjects, using only already-loaded channel capabilities 在 that 路径. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Sessions/channels: stop group-session metadata from loading bundled channel runtime just to classify `#channel` subjects, using only already-loaded channel capabilities on that path. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/channels: keep native 命令 和 native skill `auto` defaults 在 static channel metadata so 配置, audit, 和 命令-list checks do not load channel runtime just to read those defaults. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/channels: keep native command and native skill `auto` defaults on static channel metadata so config, audit, and command-list checks do not load channel runtime just to read those defaults. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: CLI/channels: keep channel 移除 selection 和 all-channel capabilities summaries 在 read-only 插件 metadata, loading channel runtime only 为了 the selected mutation 路径. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/channels: keep channel remove selection and all-channel capabilities summaries on read-only plugin metadata, loading channel runtime only for the selected mutation path. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: CLI/模型: keep Provider Index preview rows out 的 `模型 list --all --provider <id>` 当 the owning provider 插件 is disabled, preserving 配置 authority 为了 cold catalog fallbacks. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/models: keep Provider Index preview rows out of `models list --all --provider <id>` when the owning provider plugin is disabled, preserving config authority for cold catalog fallbacks. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: CLI/模型 runs: keep `openclaw infer 模型 run` 在 explicit OpenRouter 模型 从 loading the full provider catalog 或 inheriting chat-Agent silent-reply policy, restoring non-empty one-shot probe output. 修复 #68791. Thanks @limpredator.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/model runs: keep `openclaw infer model run` on explicit OpenRouter models from loading the full provider catalog or inheriting chat-agent silent-reply policy, restoring non-empty one-shot probe output. Fixes #68791. Thanks @limpredator.

changes.title: Installer/macOS: rerun Homebrew install steps 不适用 the gum spinner 当 raw-mode ioctl failures occur, 和 避免 claiming `node@24` was installed 当 the Homebrew keg binary is missing. 修复 #70411. Thanks @1fanwang 和 @dad-io.
changes.rawTitle: Installer/macOS: rerun Homebrew install steps without the gum spinner when raw-mode ioctl failures occur, and avoid claiming `node@24` was installed when the Homebrew keg binary is missing. Fixes #70411. Thanks @1fanwang and @dad-io.

changes.title: Installer: load nvm 之前 Node.js detection so `curl | bash` installs respect nvm-managed Node 而不是 stale system Node. 修复 #49556. Thanks @heavenlxj.
changes.rawTitle: Installer: load nvm before Node.js detection so `curl | bash` installs respect nvm-managed Node instead of stale system Node. Fixes #49556. Thanks @heavenlxj.

changes.title: Installer/Windows: route PowerShell install failures through a top-level handler so `iwr ... | iex` returns control to the current shell while direct script-file runs still exit non-zero. 修复 #38054. Thanks @PwrSrg.
changes.rawTitle: Installer/Windows: route PowerShell install failures through a top-level handler so `iwr ... | iex` returns control to the current shell while direct script-file runs still exit non-zero. Fixes #38054. Thanks @PwrSrg.

changes.title: CLI/Volta: respawn raw `openclaw` CLI runs through the named `node` shim 当 the current Node executable resolves to `volta-shim`, avoiding direct shim execution failures 在 non-interactive shells. 修复 #68672. Thanks @sanchezm86.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/Volta: respawn raw `openclaw` CLI runs through the named `node` shim when the current Node executable resolves to `volta-shim`, avoiding direct shim execution failures in non-interactive shells. Fixes #68672. Thanks @sanchezm86.

changes.title: Installer: warn 当 multiple npm global roots contain OpenClaw installs, showing active Node/npm/openclaw plus each install 路径 和 version so stale version-manager installs are visible. 修复 #40839. Thanks @zhixianio.
changes.rawTitle: Installer: warn when multiple npm global roots contain OpenClaw installs, showing active Node/npm/openclaw plus each install path and version so stale version-manager installs are visible. Fixes #40839. Thanks @zhixianio.

changes.title: Cron/tasks: recover completed cron task ledger records 从 durable run logs 和 job state 之前 marking them `lost`, reducing false `backing session missing` audit errors 为了 isolated cron runs 和 keeping offline CLI audit 从 treating its empty local cron active-job set as authoritative. 修复 #71963.
changes.rawTitle: Cron/tasks: recover completed cron task ledger records from durable run logs and job state before marking them `lost`, reducing false `backing session missing` audit errors for isolated cron runs and keeping offline CLI audit from treating its empty local cron active-job set as authoritative. Fixes #71963.

changes.title: Docker: copy patched dependency files 进入 runtime images so downstream `pnpm install` layers keep working. 修复 #69224. Thanks @gucasbrg.
changes.rawTitle: Docker: copy patched dependency files into runtime images so downstream `pnpm install` layers keep working. Fixes #69224. Thanks @gucasbrg.

changes.title: Package: include patched dependency files 在 the published npm package so downstream installs can 解决 `patchedDependencies`. (#69224) Thanks @gucasbrg 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Package: include patched dependency files in the published npm package so downstream installs can resolve `patchedDependencies`. (#69224) Thanks @gucasbrg and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/channels: treat malformed bundled channel 插件 loaders that return `undefined` as unavailable 而不是 crashing 配置 和 help paths. 修复 #69044. Thanks @frankhli843 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/channels: treat malformed bundled channel plugin loaders that return `undefined` as unavailable instead of crashing config and help paths. Fixes #69044. Thanks @frankhli843 and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Scripts/watch: show corrupted dependency package-配置 recovery guidance 当 `网关:watch` fails 期间 watcher startup, 不适用 double-logging unrelated import failures. (#58780) Thanks @roytong9 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Scripts/watch: show corrupted dependency package-config recovery guidance when `gateway:watch` fails during watcher startup, without double-logging unrelated import failures. (#58780) Thanks @roytong9 and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Signal: read Signal-CLI RPC, health checks, 和 SSE events through Node's HTTP client so Node 24/25 fetch regressions do not break Signal sends 或 inbound events. 修复 #51716 和 #53040. Thanks @Barukimang, @minupla, 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Signal: read signal-cli RPC, health checks, and SSE events through Node's HTTP client so Node 24/25 fetch regressions do not break Signal sends or inbound events. Fixes #51716 and #53040. Thanks @Barukimang, @minupla, and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Skills/Docker: run npm-backed skill dependency installs 使用 an OpenClaw-managed user prefix so non-root Docker images do not write to `/usr/local`. 修复 #59601. Thanks @chanjarster 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Skills/Docker: run npm-backed skill dependency installs with an OpenClaw-managed user prefix so non-root Docker images do not write to `/usr/local`. Fixes #59601. Thanks @chanjarster and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/runtime: submit heartbeat, cron, 和 exec wakeups as transient runtime context 而不是 visible user prompts, keeping synthetic system work out 的 chat transcripts. 修复 #66496 和 #66814. Thanks @jeades 和 @mandomaker.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/runtime: submit heartbeat, cron, and exec wakeups as transient runtime context instead of visible user prompts, keeping synthetic system work out of chat transcripts. Fixes #66496 and #66814. Thanks @jeades and @mandomaker.

changes.title: Telegram: include native quote excerpts automatically 为了 threaded replies 和 reply tags 当 the original Telegram text is available, 不适用 adding another 配置 knob. 修复 #6975. Thanks @rex05ai.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram: include native quote excerpts automatically for threaded replies and reply tags when the original Telegram text is available, without adding another config knob. Fixes #6975. Thanks @rex05ai.

changes.title: Node/Linux: make `openclaw node install` 启用 和 restart the `openclaw-node` systemd unit 而不是 the 网关 unit 在 node-only VMs. 修复 #68287. Thanks @dlebee-Agent.
changes.rawTitle: Node/Linux: make `openclaw node install` enable and restart the `openclaw-node` systemd unit instead of the gateway unit on node-only VMs. Fixes #68287. Thanks @dlebee-agent.

changes.title: 浏览器/CDP: 重试 transient raw-CDP WebSocket handshake failures 之前 any 浏览器 命令 is sent, 和 reconnect stale persistent Playwright CDP sessions 为了 safe tab-list reads 不适用 replaying mutating 浏览器 actions. 修复 #67728.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/CDP: retry transient raw-CDP WebSocket handshake failures before any browser command is sent, and reconnect stale persistent Playwright CDP sessions for safe tab-list reads without replaying mutating browser actions. Fixes #67728.

changes.title: 网关/Linux: 重试 `systemctl --user 启用` 之后 a second daemon reload 当 the freshly written 网关 unit is not visible yet 在 migrated systemd installs. 修复 #65184. Thanks @liushuaiiu.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/Linux: retry `systemctl --user enable` after a second daemon reload when the freshly written gateway unit is not visible yet on migrated systemd installs. Fixes #65184. Thanks @liushuaiiu.

changes.title: Telegram: 保留 exact selected quote text 当 sending native quote replies, 和 重试 使用 legacy replies if Telegram rejects quote parameters. (#71952) Thanks @rubencu.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram: preserve exact selected quote text when sending native quote replies, and retry with legacy replies if Telegram rejects quote parameters. (#71952) Thanks @rubencu.

changes.title: 插件/CLI: 保留 manifest name, description, format, 和 source metadata 在 cold `openclaw 插件 list` output 不适用 importing 插件 runtime. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/CLI: preserve manifest name, description, format, and source metadata in cold `openclaw plugins list` output without importing plugin runtime. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 安全/audit: read channel exposure 和 插件 allowlist ownership 从 read-only 插件 index metadata so cold audits do not depend 在 loaded channel runtime. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Security/audit: read channel exposure and plugin allowlist ownership from read-only plugin index metadata so cold audits do not depend on loaded channel runtime. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/chat: keep `/插件 list`, `/插件 启用`, 和 `/插件 禁用` 在 the persisted 插件 index 路径 so chat 插件 management does not load diagnostic/runtime 插件 registries 之前 execution. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/chat: keep `/plugins list`, `/plugins enable`, and `/plugins disable` on the persisted plugin index path so chat plugin management does not load diagnostic/runtime plugin registries before execution. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/诊断工具: read workspace 插件 status 和 legacy web-search ownership through installed-index manifest metadata 而不是 broad manifest registry scans. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/doctor: read workspace plugin status and legacy web-search ownership through installed-index manifest metadata instead of broad manifest registry scans. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: CLI/Agent: read channel provider status 从 read-only 插件 index metadata 为了 text `Agent list` output 而不是 the loaded channel registry. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/agents: read channel provider status from read-only plugin index metadata for text `agents list` output instead of the loaded channel registry. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: Logging: redact configured secret patterns at console 和 file-log sink exits so credentials that reach the logger are masked 之前 terminal display 或 JSONL persistence. 修复 #67953. Thanks @Ziy1-Tan.
changes.rawTitle: Logging: redact configured secret patterns at console and file-log sink exits so credentials that reach the logger are masked before terminal display or JSONL persistence. Fixes #67953. Thanks @Ziy1-Tan.

changes.title: 网关/services: refuse process 和 service mutations 从 an older OpenClaw binary 当 the 配置 was last written 通过 a newer version, preventing split-brain installs 从 stopping 或 rewriting newer 网关 services. 修复 #57079.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/services: refuse process and service mutations from an older OpenClaw binary when the config was last written by a newer version, preventing split-brain installs from stopping or rewriting newer gateway services. Fixes #57079.

changes.title: 网关: reserve `/healthz` 和 `/readyz` ahead 的 插件, canvas, 和 Control 界面 HTTP stages so liveness/readiness probes still answer 当 a later route handler stalls. 修复 #69674. Thanks @Xike-Creek.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway: reserve `/healthz` and `/readyz` ahead of plugin, canvas, and Control UI HTTP stages so liveness/readiness probes still answer when a later route handler stalls. Fixes #69674. Thanks @Xike-Creek.

changes.title: Logging: load `logging.file` 和 redaction settings directly 从 the active OpenClaw 配置 路径 在 bundled runtimes, so packaged gateways 停止 falling back to `/tmp/openclaw`. 修复 #59370, #67168, 和 #61295. Thanks @KeaneYan, @Pan9hu, 和 @zsjlovelike.
changes.rawTitle: Logging: load `logging.file` and redaction settings directly from the active OpenClaw config path in bundled runtimes, so packaged gateways stop falling back to `/tmp/openclaw`. Fixes #59370, #67168, and #61295. Thanks @KeaneYan, @Pan9hu, and @zsjlovelike.

changes.title: Logging: rotate file logs at `logging.maxFileBytes`, keep bounded numbered archives, 和 make long-lived rolling loggers follow the current-day file 而不是 suppressing diagnostics 或 writing stale dated files. 修复 #58583 和 #62381. Thanks @jpeghead 和 @zhaoleink.
changes.rawTitle: Logging: rotate file logs at `logging.maxFileBytes`, keep bounded numbered archives, and make long-lived rolling loggers follow the current-day file instead of suppressing diagnostics or writing stale dated files. Fixes #58583 and #62381. Thanks @jpeghead and @zhaoleink.

changes.title: Agent/groups: treat clean empty assistant stops as silent `NO_REPLY` only 为了 always-在 groups where silent replies are allowed, while keeping direct 和 mention-gated sessions 在 the incomplete-turn 重试 路径. Thanks @MagnaAI.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/groups: treat clean empty assistant stops as silent `NO_REPLY` only for always-on groups where silent replies are allowed, while keeping direct and mention-gated sessions on the incomplete-turn retry path. Thanks @MagnaAI.

changes.title: macOS/Node: keep native remote app nodes 从 advertising `浏览器.代理`, start 浏览器-capable CLI node services through the restored `openclaw node start` 命令, 和 show an actionable 浏览器-control 错误 当 the local control service is missing. 修复 #66637.
changes.rawTitle: macOS/Node: keep native remote app nodes from advertising `browser.proxy`, start browser-capable CLI node services through the restored `openclaw node start` command, and show an actionable browser-control error when the local control service is missing. Fixes #66637.

changes.title: 网关/更新: fail package updates 当 the restarted managed 网关 reports the wrong version, including fallback restarts 和 JSON mode, avoiding false-success mixed-version restarts 之后 macOS LaunchAgent updates. 修复 #71835. Thanks @abhinas90 和 @jsompis.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/update: fail package updates when the restarted managed gateway reports the wrong version, including fallback restarts and JSON mode, avoiding false-success mixed-version restarts after macOS LaunchAgent updates. Fixes #71835. Thanks @abhinas90 and @jsompis.

changes.title: 网关/更新: warn 之前 package updates 和 bundled 插件 runtime-dependency repairs 当 the target volume appears low 在 disk space, 不适用 blocking installs 在 best-effort filesystem checks. 修复 #71835. Thanks @abhinas90 和 @jsompis.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/update: warn before package updates and bundled plugin runtime-dependency repairs when the target volume appears low on disk space, without blocking installs on best-effort filesystem checks. Fixes #71835. Thanks @abhinas90 and @jsompis.

changes.title: 插件/runtime deps: surface activated 插件 load failures 在 health 和 fail package-更新 restart verification 或 诊断工具 repair 当 bundled runtime deps still cannot load, avoiding false-success repairs. (#71883) Thanks @Solvely-Colin.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/runtime deps: surface activated plugin load failures in health and fail package-update restart verification or doctor repair when bundled runtime deps still cannot load, avoiding false-success repairs. (#71883) Thanks @Solvely-Colin.

changes.title: 网关/Linux: include fnm `aliases/default/bin` 在 generated service PATHs 和 let 诊断工具 accept either modern fnm aliases 或 the legacy `current/bin` symlink, avoiding false 路径 repair prompts. 修复 #68169. Thanks @richard-scott.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/Linux: include fnm `aliases/default/bin` in generated service PATHs and let doctor accept either modern fnm aliases or the legacy `current/bin` symlink, avoiding false PATH repair prompts. Fixes #68169. Thanks @richard-scott.

changes.title: Installer/Linux: run apt installs 使用 noninteractive dpkg 和 needrestart settings so fresh Ubuntu 24.04 `curl | bash` installs do not hang while installing Node.js, Git, 或 build tools. 修复 #41146. Thanks @iht76, @alexcarv318, @cs3gallery, @firofame, 和 @cgdusek.
changes.rawTitle: Installer/Linux: run apt installs with noninteractive dpkg and needrestart settings so fresh Ubuntu 24.04 `curl | bash` installs do not hang while installing Node.js, Git, or build tools. Fixes #41146. Thanks @iht76, @alexcarv318, @cs3gallery, @firofame, and @cgdusek.

changes.title: Providers/Bedrock: defer the AWS SDK import until Bedrock discovery actually runs so 插件 registration 和 setup stay lightweight 在 cold start. 修复 #71690. Thanks @jarvis-ai-gregmoser.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Bedrock: defer the AWS SDK import until Bedrock discovery actually runs so plugin registration and setup stay lightweight on cold start. Fixes #71690. Thanks @jarvis-ai-gregmoser.

changes.title: Installer/macOS: 停止 immediately 当 Homebrew `node@24` installation fails 和 避免 printing 路径 advice 为了 missing Homebrew Node installs. 修复 #70411. Thanks @1fanwang.
changes.rawTitle: Installer/macOS: stop immediately when Homebrew `node@24` installation fails and avoid printing PATH advice for missing Homebrew Node installs. Fixes #70411. Thanks @1fanwang.

changes.title: WhatsApp: 移除 ack reactions 之后 a visible reply 当 `messages.removeAckAfterReply` is enabled, matching other reaction-capable channels. 修复 #26183. Thanks @MrUnforsaken.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp: remove ack reactions after a visible reply when `messages.removeAckAfterReply` is enabled, matching other reaction-capable channels. Fixes #26183. Thanks @MrUnforsaken.

changes.title: Providers/Z.AI: map OpenClaw thinking controls to Z.AI's `thinking` payload 和 添加 opt-在 preserved thinking replay via `params.preserveThinking`, so GLM 5.x can keep prior `reasoning_content` 当 requested. 修复 #58680. Thanks @xuanmingguo.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Z.AI: map OpenClaw thinking controls to Z.AI's `thinking` payload and add opt-in preserved thinking replay via `params.preserveThinking`, so GLM 5.x can keep prior `reasoning_content` when requested. Fixes #58680. Thanks @xuanmingguo.

changes.title: Channels/status: keep read-only channel lists 在 manifest 和 package metadata 通过 default, loading setup runtime only 为了 explicit fallback callers. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Channels/status: keep read-only channel lists on manifest and package metadata by default, loading setup runtime only for explicit fallback callers. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件: scope setup 和 web-provider metadata manifest reads to explicit 插件 ids 当 callers already know the owning 插件 set. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins: scope setup and web-provider metadata manifest reads to explicit plugin ids when callers already know the owning plugin set. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/onboarding: defer onboarding install-record index writes until the guarded 配置 commit so setup failures cannot leave the 插件 index ahead 的 `openclaw.json`. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/onboarding: defer onboarding install-record index writes until the guarded config commit so setup failures cannot leave the plugin index ahead of `openclaw.json`. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/registry: 解决 web provider ownership 从 the installed 插件 index 而不是 broad manifest scans 在 secret, 工具, 和 pricing paths. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/registry: resolve web provider ownership from the installed plugin index instead of broad manifest scans on secret, tool, and pricing paths. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 配置/providers: accept `video` 和 `audio` 在 configured 模型 `input` values 和 保留 them 在 provider catalog entries. 修复 #20721. Thanks @alvinttang.
changes.rawTitle: Config/providers: accept `video` and `audio` in configured model `input` values and preserve them in provider catalog entries. Fixes #20721. Thanks @alvinttang.

changes.title: 模型/认证: honor the parent `--Agent` flag 为了 认证 write commands (`添加`, `login`, `setup-令牌`, `paste-令牌`, 和 the GitHub Copilot shortcut) so OAuth认证/API-密钥/令牌 results are written to the requested Agent store 而不是 the default Agent. 修复 #71864. (#71933) Thanks @balric-seo.
changes.rawTitle: Models/auth: honor the parent `--agent` flag for auth write commands (`add`, `login`, `setup-token`, `paste-token`, and the GitHub Copilot shortcut) so OAuth/API-key/token results are written to the requested agent store instead of the default agent. Fixes #71864. (#71933) Thanks @balric-seo.

changes.title: TTS: strip 模型-emitted TTS directives 从 streamed block text 之前 channel delivery, including directives split across adjacent blocks, while preserving the accumulated raw reply 为了 final-mode synthesis. 修复 #38937.
changes.rawTitle: TTS: strip model-emitted TTS directives from streamed block text before channel delivery, including directives split across adjacent blocks, while preserving the accumulated raw reply for final-mode synthesis. Fixes #38937.

changes.title: TTS: keep explicit `provider=...` directive keys scoped to that provider 和 warn 在 unsupported keys 而不是 letting another speech provider consume overlapping keys. 修复 #60131.
changes.rawTitle: TTS: keep explicit `provider=...` directive keys scoped to that provider and warn on unsupported keys instead of letting another speech provider consume overlapping keys. Fixes #60131.

changes.title: TTS/飞书: normalize final-mode streamed TTS-only audio 之前 delivery so generated 语音-note files use the same safe media 路径 和 native 语音 routing as normal final replies. 修复 #71920.
changes.rawTitle: TTS/Feishu: normalize final-mode streamed TTS-only audio before delivery so generated voice-note files use the same safe media path and native voice routing as normal final replies. Fixes #71920.

changes.title: 飞书: transcribe inbound 语音-note audio 使用 the shared media audio 路径 之前 Agent dispatch 和 keep raw 飞书 `file_key` payloads out 的 message text. 修复 #67120 和 #61876.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu: transcribe inbound voice-note audio with the shared media audio path before agent dispatch and keep raw Feishu `file_key` payloads out of message text. Fixes #67120 and #61876.

changes.title: Tasks: terminalize async 网关 Agent task records 从 the 网关 run result while preserving aborted, failed, 和 cancelled outcomes 而不是 leaving completed runs stuck as active 或 lost. (#71905) Thanks @likewen-tech.
changes.rawTitle: Tasks: terminalize async Gateway agent task records from the Gateway run result while preserving aborted, failed, and cancelled outcomes instead of leaving completed runs stuck as active or lost. (#71905) Thanks @likewen-tech.

changes.title: WhatsApp: let authorized group 语音-note transcripts satisfy mention gating 之前 reply dispatch, while keeping unmentioned transcripts 在 pending group history. 修复 #44908.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp: let authorized group voice-note transcripts satisfy mention gating before reply dispatch, while keeping unmentioned transcripts in pending group history. Fixes #44908.

changes.title: Media understanding: carry channel 语音-note preflight state 进入 attachment selection so WhatsApp, 飞书, Telegram, 和 Discord do not transcribe the same inbound audio twice. 修复 #70580.
changes.rawTitle: Media understanding: carry channel voice-note preflight state into attachment selection so WhatsApp, Feishu, Telegram, and Discord do not transcribe the same inbound audio twice. Fixes #70580.

changes.rawTitle: TTS/BlueBubbles: deliver compatible auto-TTS audio as iMessage voice memo bubbles instead of plain MP3/CAF file attachments. Fixes #16848.

changes.rawTitle: TTS: resolve voice-note and voice-memo routing from channel plugin capabilities instead of speech-core-owned channel id lists.

changes.title: ACP: send subagent 和 async-task completion wakes to external ACP harnesses as plain prompts 而不是 OpenClaw internal runtime-context envelopes, while keeping those envelopes out 的 ACP transcripts.
changes.rawTitle: ACP: send subagent and async-task completion wakes to external ACP harnesses as plain prompts instead of OpenClaw internal runtime-context envelopes, while keeping those envelopes out of ACP transcripts.

changes.title: TTS/status: show configured TTS 模型, 语音, 和 sanitized custom endpoint 在 `/status`, 保留 OpenAI-compatible TTS instructions 在 custom endpoints, 和 重试 empty Microsoft/Edge TTS output once. Addresses #46602, #47232, 和 #43936. Thanks @leekuangtao, @Huntterxx, 和 @rex993.
changes.rawTitle: TTS/status: show configured TTS model, voice, and sanitized custom endpoint in `/status`, preserve OpenAI-compatible TTS instructions on custom endpoints, and retry empty Microsoft/Edge TTS output once. Addresses #46602, #47232, and #43936. Thanks @leekuangtao, @Huntterxx, and @rex993.

changes.title: Agent/网关: steer Agent-driven 配置 edits 和 restarts through the owner-only `网关` 工具, document `配置.schema.lookup` as the field-doc source, 和 warn against using `网关 停止 && 网关 start` as a restart substitute 在 macOS. 修复 #71929. Thanks @ygc3817922006-sketch.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Gateway: steer agent-driven config edits and restarts through the owner-only `gateway` tool, document `config.schema.lookup` as the field-doc source, and warn against using `gateway stop && gateway start` as a restart substitute on macOS. Fixes #71929. Thanks @ygc3817922006-sketch.

changes.title: Media understanding/audio: inject a deterministic transcript placeholder 为了 too-small 语音 notes so Agent do not hallucinate transcription 或 provider failures. 修复 #48944. Thanks @eulicesl.
changes.rawTitle: Media understanding/audio: inject a deterministic transcript placeholder for too-small voice notes so agents do not hallucinate transcription or provider failures. Fixes #48944. Thanks @eulicesl.

changes.title: Providers/vLLM: send Nemotron 3 chat-template kwargs 当 thinking is off 和 honor configured `params.chat_template_kwargs` 为了 OpenAI-compatible completions, so vLLM/Nemotron replies stay visible 而不是 becoming thinking-only. 修复 #71891. Thanks @jmystaki-create 和 @dennis-lynch.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/vLLM: send Nemotron 3 chat-template kwargs when thinking is off and honor configured `params.chat_template_kwargs` for OpenAI-compatible completions, so vLLM/Nemotron replies stay visible instead of becoming thinking-only. Fixes #71891. Thanks @jmystaki-create and @dennis-lynch.

changes.title: Channels/replies: strip copied inbound metadata blocks 从 user-facing assistant replies 和 模型 replay history, so Discord/vLLM sessions do not leak `Conversation info` / `UNTRUSTED ... message body` envelopes 之后 a 模型 echoes them. 修复 #71847. Thanks @jmystaki-create.
changes.rawTitle: Channels/replies: strip copied inbound metadata blocks from user-facing assistant replies and model replay history, so Discord/vLLM sessions do not leak `Conversation info` / `UNTRUSTED ... message body` envelopes after a model echoes them. Fixes #71847. Thanks @jmystaki-create.

changes.title: Subagents/内存: keep inter-session completion wakes out 的 内存 和 dreaming session exports, 和 strip internal runtime-context blocks 从 realtime Control 界面 chat events.
changes.rawTitle: Subagents/memory: keep inter-session completion wakes out of memory and dreaming session exports, and strip internal runtime-context blocks from realtime Control UI chat events.

changes.title: Agent/Claude: treat zero-令牌 empty `停止` turns as failed provider output, 重试 once, repair replay, 和 允许 configured 模型 fallback 而不是 preserving them as successful silent replies. 修复 #71880. Thanks @MagnaAI.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Claude: treat zero-token empty `stop` turns as failed provider output, retry once, repair replay, and allow configured model fallback instead of preserving them as successful silent replies. Fixes #71880. Thanks @MagnaAI.

changes.title: Tasks: normalize task lifecycle timestamps at create, 更新, 和 restore time, 和 report retained lost tasks as audit warnings until their cleanup window expires. (#71871) Thanks @likewen-tech.
changes.rawTitle: Tasks: normalize task lifecycle timestamps at create, update, and restore time, and report retained lost tasks as audit warnings until their cleanup window expires. (#71871) Thanks @likewen-tech.

changes.title: Diagnostics/OTEL: treat normal early 模型 stream cleanup as a completed 模型 call 而不是 exporting a misleading `StreamAbandoned` 错误 span. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Diagnostics/OTEL: treat normal early model stream cleanup as a completed model call instead of exporting a misleading `StreamAbandoned` error span. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/pairing: 停止 corrupt 或 unreadable device/node pairing stores 从 being treated as empty state, preserving `paired.json` 为了 repair 而不是 overwriting approved pairings. 修复 #71873. Thanks @iret77.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/pairing: stop corrupt or unreadable device/node pairing stores from being treated as empty state, preserving `paired.json` for repair instead of overwriting approved pairings. Fixes #71873. Thanks @iret77.

changes.title: ACP: keep `/acp` management commands, plus local `/status` 和 `/unfocus`, 在 the 网关 路径 inside ACP-bound threads so they are not consumed as ACP prompt text. 修复 #66298. Thanks @kindomLee.
changes.rawTitle: ACP: keep `/acp` management commands, plus local `/status` and `/unfocus`, on the Gateway path inside ACP-bound threads so they are not consumed as ACP prompt text. Fixes #66298. Thanks @kindomLee.

changes.title: ACPX: 停止 probing ACP Agent 期间 normal 网关 startup; the embedded backend 现在 registers 不适用 spawning Codex/ACP child processes unless `OPENCLAW_ACPX_RUNTIME_STARTUP_PROBE=1` is explicitly set.
changes.rawTitle: ACPX: stop probing ACP agents during normal Gateway startup; the embedded backend now registers without spawning Codex/ACP child processes unless `OPENCLAW_ACPX_RUNTIME_STARTUP_PROBE=1` is explicitly set.

changes.title: CLI/image edit: accept `--size`, `--aspect-ratio`, 和 `--resolution` 在 `openclaw infer image edit` 和 report all supported edit flags 从 `capability inspect image.edit`. Thanks @Pinghuachiu.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/image edit: accept `--size`, `--aspect-ratio`, and `--resolution` on `openclaw infer image edit` and report all supported edit flags from `capability inspect image.edit`. Thanks @Pinghuachiu.

changes.rawTitle: ACP: wait for the configured runtime backend to become healthy before startup identity reconciliation, avoiding transient acpx warnings during Gateway boot. Fixes #40566.

changes.title: Channels/ACP bindings: time out configured binding readiness checks 而不是 letting Discord preflight hang forever 当 an ACP target never settles. 修复 #68776.
changes.rawTitle: Channels/ACP bindings: time out configured binding readiness checks instead of letting Discord preflight hang forever when an ACP target never settles. Fixes #68776.

changes.title: Control 界面: hide the chat loading skeleton 期间 background history reloads 当 existing messages 或 active stream content are already visible, avoiding reload flashes 在 high-latency local gateways. 修复 #71844. Thanks @WolvenRA.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI: hide the chat loading skeleton during background history reloads when existing messages or active stream content are already visible, avoiding reload flashes on high-latency local gateways. Fixes #71844. Thanks @WolvenRA.

changes.title: Control 界面: keep locally optimistic chat messages visible 当 a history reload temporarily returns empty, avoiding lost first-turn messages 在 high-latency gateways. 修复 #71878. Thanks @WolvenRA.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI: keep locally optimistic chat messages visible when a history reload temporarily returns empty, avoiding lost first-turn messages on high-latency gateways. Fixes #71878. Thanks @WolvenRA.

changes.rawTitle: Control UI: keep chat history limits based on visible messages after filtering heartbeat and control-only transcript rows, so recent hidden entries no longer make older visible replies disappear. Thanks @WolvenRA.

changes.rawTitle: Agents/images: scrub old `[media attached: ...]`, `[Image: source: ...]`, and `media://inbound/...` markers from pruned model replay context so stale media refs are not rehydrated as fresh prompt images. Fixes #71868. Thanks @jmeadlock.

changes.title: Docker/Bonjour: 禁用 Bonjour/mDNS advertising 通过 default 为了 bundled Compose gateways 在 bridge networking, while keeping host/macvlan opt-在 使用 `OPENCLAW_DISABLE_BONJOUR=0`. 修复 #71879. Thanks @gbballpack.
changes.rawTitle: Docker/Bonjour: disable Bonjour/mDNS advertising by default for bundled Compose gateways on bridge networking, while keeping host/macvlan opt-in with `OPENCLAW_DISABLE_BONJOUR=0`. Fixes #71879. Thanks @gbballpack.

changes.title: CLI/status: label the OpenClaw Serve/Funnel 设置 as `Tailscale exposure` 和 show daemon state separately 当 available, so `网关.tailscale.mode: "off"` no longer reads like the Tailscale daemon is stopped. 修复 #71790. Thanks @pesvobodak.
