changes.title: 认证/Codex: bootstrap `OpenAI-Codex:default` 从 Codex CLI credentials 在 fresh installs 不适用 replacing a locally refreshed OpenClaw OAuth认证 令牌 later. 修复 #71305. Thanks @Gforce10-design.
changes.rawTitle: Auth/Codex: bootstrap `openai-codex:default` from Codex CLI credentials on fresh installs without replacing a locally refreshed OpenClaw OAuth token later. Fixes #71305. Thanks @Gforce10-design.

changes.title: 插件 SDK/工具-result transforms: bound middleware `details`, validate 在-place result mutations, 和 mark fail-closed middleware fallbacks 使用 canonical `错误` status. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugin SDK/tool-result transforms: bound middleware `details`, validate in-place result mutations, and mark fail-closed middleware fallbacks with canonical `error` status. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Discord/网关: 防止 startup 从 getting stuck at `awaiting 网关 readiness` 当 Carbon 网关 registration races 使用 a lifecycle reconnect. 修复 #52372. (#68159) Thanks @IVY-AI-gif.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/gateway: prevent startup from getting stuck at `awaiting gateway readiness` when Carbon gateway registration races with a lifecycle reconnect. Fixes #52372. (#68159) Thanks @IVY-AI-gif.

changes.title: Discord/网关: supervise Carbon's async 网关 registration promise so fatal Discord metadata failures surface through startup 而不是 process-level unhandled rejections. (#62451) Thanks @safzanpirani.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/gateway: supervise Carbon's async gateway registration promise so fatal Discord metadata failures surface through startup instead of process-level unhandled rejections. (#62451) Thanks @safzanpirani.

changes.title: Discord/网关: record websocket frame activity as transport liveness, so idle 但是 healthy Discord gateways no longer look stale 之间 user messages. (#68213) Thanks @bmadwaves.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/gateway: record websocket frame activity as transport liveness, so idle but healthy Discord gateways no longer look stale between user messages. (#68213) Thanks @bmadwaves.

changes.title: Slack/streaming: suppress block replies while native 或 draft preview streaming owns the turn, preventing duplicate Slack delivery 当 block streaming is also enabled. Addresses #56675. Thanks @hsiaoa.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/streaming: suppress block replies while native or draft preview streaming owns the turn, preventing duplicate Slack delivery when block streaming is also enabled. Addresses #56675. Thanks @hsiaoa.

changes.title: 插件/cache: restore 插件 命令 和 interactive handler registries 在 loader cache hits 不适用 resetting interactive callback dedupe, so cached external 插件 keep slash commands 和 callback handlers available 之后 reloads. 修复 #71100. Thanks @BomBastikDE.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/cache: restore plugin command and interactive handler registries on loader cache hits without resetting interactive callback dedupe, so cached external plugins keep slash commands and callback handlers available after reloads. Fixes #71100. Thanks @BomBastikDE.

changes.title: 网关/OpenAI-compatible: report non-zero 令牌 usage 为了 `/v1/chat/completions` 当 the Agent run has only last-call usage metadata available. 修复 #71118. (#71242) Thanks @RenzoMXD.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/OpenAI-compatible: report non-zero token usage for `/v1/chat/completions` when the agent run has only last-call usage metadata available. Fixes #71118. (#71242) Thanks @RenzoMXD.

changes.title: 插件 SDK/工具-result transforms: restrict harness 工具-result middleware to bundled 插件, fail closed 在 middleware errors, validate rewritten result shapes, 保留 Pi per-call ids, 和 keep Codex media trust checks anchored to raw 工具 provenance. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugin SDK/tool-result transforms: restrict harness tool-result middleware to bundled plugins, fail closed on middleware errors, validate rewritten result shapes, preserve Pi per-call ids, and keep Codex media trust checks anchored to raw tool provenance. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/MCP协议 loopback: apply owner-only 工具 policy 和 run 之前-工具-call hooks 在 `127.0.0.1/MCP协议` `tools/list` 和 `tools/call`, so non-owner bearer callers can no longer see 或 invoke owner-only tools such as `cron`, `网关`, 和 `nodes`, matching the existing HTTP `/tools/invoke` 和 embedded-Agent paths. (#71159) Thanks @mmaps.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/MCP loopback: apply owner-only tool policy and run before-tool-call hooks on `127.0.0.1/mcp` `tools/list` and `tools/call`, so non-owner bearer callers can no longer see or invoke owner-only tools such as `cron`, `gateway`, and `nodes`, matching the existing HTTP `/tools/invoke` and embedded-agent paths. (#71159) Thanks @mmaps.

changes.title: Codex harness/安全: wait 为了 final app-server approval decisions 和 sanitize approval preview text, so native Codex permission prompts cannot be resolved 通过 an early placeholder decision 或 render unsafe terminal/control content. (#70751, #70569) Thanks @Lucenx9.
changes.rawTitle: Codex harness/security: wait for final app-server approval decisions and sanitize approval preview text, so native Codex permission prompts cannot be resolved by an early placeholder decision or render unsafe terminal/control content. (#70751, #70569) Thanks @Lucenx9.

changes.title: Providers/语音 安全: route ElevenLabs TTS 和 OpenAI Realtime 浏览器-session secret creation through guarded fetch paths, preserving provider calls while keeping SSRF protections 在 语音 surfaces.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/voice security: route ElevenLabs TTS and OpenAI Realtime browser-session secret creation through guarded fetch paths, preserving provider calls while keeping SSRF protections on voice surfaces.

changes.title: Agent/OpenAI WS: match Codex's Responses WebSocket continuation strategy, sending only strict incremental follow-up input 使用 `previous_response_id` 和 falling back to full context 当 the replay chain 或 request shape differs. 修复 #44948. Thanks @hss-oss.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/OpenAI WS: match Codex's Responses WebSocket continuation strategy, sending only strict incremental follow-up input with `previous_response_id` and falling back to full context when the replay chain or request shape differs. Fixes #44948. Thanks @hss-oss.

changes.title: 插件/Google Chat: log Webhook 认证 rejection reasons only 之后 all candidates fail, 和 warn 当 添加-在 `appPrincipal` values do not match configuration. 修复 #71078. (#71145) Thanks @luyao618.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/Google Chat: log webhook auth rejection reasons only after all candidates fail, and warn when add-on `appPrincipal` values do not match configuration. Fixes #71078. (#71145) Thanks @luyao618.

changes.title: 模型/configure: 保留 the existing default 模型 当 provider 认证 is re-run 从 configure while keeping explicit default-设置 commands authoritative. 修复 #70696. (#70793) Thanks @Sathvik-1007.
changes.rawTitle: Models/configure: preserve the existing default model when provider auth is re-run from configure while keeping explicit default-setting commands authoritative. Fixes #70696. (#70793) Thanks @Sathvik-1007.

changes.title: 配置/插件: accept `插件.entries.*.hooks.allowConversationAccess` 在 validation, generated schema metadata, 和 插件 policy inspection so trusted external 插件 can 启用 conversation-access hooks such as `agent_end` 不适用 local schema patches. 修复 #71215. (#71221) Thanks @BillChirico.
changes.rawTitle: Config/plugins: accept `plugins.entries.*.hooks.allowConversationAccess` in validation, generated schema metadata, and plugin policy inspection so trusted external plugins can enable conversation-access hooks such as `agent_end` without local schema patches. Fixes #71215. (#71221) Thanks @BillChirico.

changes.rawTitle: Models/runtime: show one model provider choice per provider and move Codex, Claude CLI, and Gemini CLI execution into explicit runtime selection while keeping fallback-only legacy runtime refs unchanged. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/runtime deps: respect explicit 插件 和 channel disablement 当 repairing bundled runtime dependencies, so 诊断工具 和 health checks no longer install deps 为了 disabled configured channels. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/runtime deps: respect explicit plugin and channel disablement when repairing bundled runtime dependencies, so doctor and health checks no longer install deps for disabled configured channels. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Diagnostics/OTEL: export logs through bounded diagnostic log events 而不是 a direct logger transport hook. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Diagnostics/OTEL: export logs through bounded diagnostic log events instead of a direct logger transport hook. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp/plugins: support an explicit opt-in for inbound `message_received` hooks with canonical channel, conversation, session, and sender fields. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Channels/setup: keep bundled setup entries dependency-light and stage WhatsApp runtime dependencies only when login actually needs them, so first-run setup and read-only channel discovery avoid unused SDK imports.

changes.title: Slack/HTTP: keep Webhook handlers 在 a process-global registry so HTTP mode survives 插件-loader/native-import splits 和 `/Slack/events/<account>` no longer returns 404 之后 logging as active. 修复 #67955, #46245, 和 #46246. Thanks @chrisabad 和 @cesararevalo.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/HTTP: keep webhook handlers in a process-global registry so HTTP mode survives plugin-loader/native-import splits and `/slack/events/<account>` no longer returns 404 after logging as active. Fixes #67955, #46245, and #46246. Thanks @chrisabad and @cesararevalo.

changes.title: Diagnostics: harden 工具 和 模型 diagnostic events against hostile errors, blocking listeners, 和 unsafe stability reason fields. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Diagnostics: harden tool and model diagnostic events against hostile errors, blocking listeners, and unsafe stability reason fields. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/onboarding: record local 插件 install source metadata 不适用 duplicating raw absolute local paths 在 persisted `插件.installs`, while preserving linked load-路径 cleanup. (#70970) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/onboarding: record local plugin install source metadata without duplicating raw absolute local paths in persisted `plugins.installs`, while preserving linked load-path cleanup. (#70970) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Group chats/silent replies: tighten `NO_REPLY` prompt guidance so groups stay quiet 不适用 narrating silence 或 emitting fallback chatter 当 silence is the intended outcome. (#70954, #71209) Thanks @Takhoffman.
changes.rawTitle: Group chats/silent replies: tighten `NO_REPLY` prompt guidance so groups stay quiet without narrating silence or emitting fallback chatter when silence is the intended outcome. (#70954, #71209) Thanks @Takhoffman.

changes.title: WhatsApp/groups+direct: 设置 `systemPrompt: ""` 在 a specific `groups.<id>` 或 `direct.<peerId>` entry 现在 suppresses the wildcard system prompt 而不是 falling through to it, so users can silence the global prompt 为了 a specific group 或 peer. (#70381) Thanks @Bluetegu.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp/groups+direct: setting `systemPrompt: ""` on a specific `groups.<id>` or `direct.<peerId>` entry now suppresses the wildcard system prompt instead of falling through to it, so users can silence the global prompt for a specific group or peer. (#70381) Thanks @Bluetegu.

changes.rawTitle: Browser/tool: tell agents not to pass per-call `timeoutMs` on existing-session type, evaluate, and other Chrome MCP actions that reject timeout overrides.

changes.rawTitle: Browser/tool: use Playwright's current AI aria snapshot API for `refs="aria"` and fall back to role refs when a node browser cannot provide aria refs, so agents can still inspect and click controls such as Google Meet admission buttons.

changes.rawTitle: Browser/tool: expose stable `tabId` handles such as `t1` plus optional tab labels, and accept those handles anywhere a browser tab target is needed.

changes.rawTitle: Codex/GPT-5.4: harden fallback, auth-profile, tool-schema, and replay edge cases across native and embedded runtime paths. (#70743) Thanks @100yenadmin.

changes.rawTitle: Models/CLI: keep `openclaw models list` read-only while still showing eligible configured-provider rows, so listing models no longer rewrites per-agent `models.json`. (#70847) Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: Agent/transport: propagate configured attempt timeouts 进入 guarded per-request dispatchers, so slow local LLM calls such as Ollama no longer fail at Undici's default 60-second body 超时. 修复 #70829. (#70831) Thanks @DranboFieldston.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/providers: mirror runtime auth choices in bundled provider manifests and detect `KIMI_API_KEY` for Moonshot/Kimi web search before plugin runtime loads. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/chat: register chat.send runs 在 the chat run registry so lifecycle 错误 events reach the client 而不是 being 静默地 dropped, fixing stuck 'waiting' state 和 /abort reporting no active run. (#69747) Thanks @wangshu94.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/chat: register chat.send runs in the chat run registry so lifecycle error events reach the client instead of being silently dropped, fixing stuck 'waiting' state and /abort reporting no active run. (#69747) Thanks @wangshu94.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/QQ Bot: enable the bundled qqbot plugin by default so its runtime dependency `@tencent-connect/qqbot-connector` is installed on first launch, unblocking the QR-code binding flow that dynamically imports the connector before any account is configured. changes.title: 网关/Agent RPC: register active `Agent` runs 进入 the chat abort controller map so `chat.abort` 和 `sessions.abort` can interrupt them, matching `chat.send` behavior 和 unblocking external runtimes that drive the 网关 through the public `Agent` RPC. 修复 #71128. (#71214) Thanks @bitloi.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/agent RPC: register active `agent` runs into the chat abort controller map so `chat.abort` and `sessions.abort` can interrupt them, matching `chat.send` behavior and unblocking external runtimes that drive the Gateway through the public `agent` RPC. Fixes #71128. (#71214) Thanks @bitloi.

changes.title: Matrix/CLI: pass resolved runtime 配置 进入 verify commands, so `openclaw matrix verify status` 和 sibling verify subcommands no longer 崩溃 之前 acquiring the Matrix client. 修复 #70992. (#71102) Thanks @luyao618.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/CLI: pass resolved runtime config into verify commands, so `openclaw matrix verify status` and sibling verify subcommands no longer crash before acquiring the Matrix client. Fixes #70992. (#71102) Thanks @luyao618.

changes.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: await startup sidecars before channel monitors report ready, reducing Discord and plugin startup races while still keeping gateway boot observability intact.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/Google Meet: report required manual actions for Chrome joins, use browser automation for Meet entry, and persist the private-WS node opt-in so paired-node realtime sessions keep their intended network policy.

changes.rawTitle: Memory search: apply session visibility and agent-to-agent policy to session transcript hits, and keep `corpus=sessions` ranking scoped to session collections before result limiting. (#70761) Thanks @nefainl.

items.title: Google Meet joins OpenClaw as a bundled participant 插件, 使用 personal Google 认证, Chrome/Twilio realtime sessions, paired-node Chrome 支持, artifact/attendance exports, 和 recovery tooling 为了 already-open Meet tabs.
items.rawTitle: Google Meet joins OpenClaw as a bundled participant plugin, with personal Google auth, Chrome/Twilio realtime sessions, paired-node Chrome support, artifact/attendance exports, and recovery tooling for already-open Meet tabs.

items.title: 浏览器 automation gets coordinate clicks, longer default action budgets, per-profile headless overrides, 和 steadier tab 复用/recovery.
items.rawTitle: Browser automation gets coordinate clicks, longer default action budgets, per-profile headless overrides, and steadier tab reuse/recovery.

items.title: Control 界面/Talk: 添加 浏览器 WebRTC realtime 语音 sessions backed 通过 OpenAI Realtime, 使用 网关-minted ephemeral client secrets 和 `openclaw_agent_consult` handoff to the full OpenClaw Agent.
items.rawTitle: Control UI/Talk: add browser WebRTC realtime voice sessions backed by OpenAI Realtime, with Gateway-minted ephemeral client secrets and `openclaw_agent_consult` handoff to the full OpenClaw agent.

items.title: 插件/Google Meet: 添加 a bundled participant 插件 使用 personal Google 认证, explicit meeting URL joins, Chrome 和 Twilio realtime transports, paired-node `Chrome-node` 支持 为了 Parallels-style Chrome/BlackHole/SoX hosts, 和 full-Agent consults inside live 语音 sessions. (#70765)
items.rawTitle: Plugins/Google Meet: add a bundled participant plugin with personal Google auth, explicit meeting URL joins, Chrome and Twilio realtime transports, paired-node `chrome-node` support for Parallels-style Chrome/BlackHole/SoX hosts, and full-agent consults inside live voice sessions. items.title: 插件/loader: use cached discovery-mode snapshot loads 为了 read-only 插件 capability lookups, keep snapshot caches isolated 从 active 网关 registries, 和 make same-插件 channel/HTTP route re-registration idempotent so repeated snapshot 或 hot-reload paths no longer rerun full 插件 side effects 或 accumulate duplicate surfaces. 修复 #51781, #52031, #54181, 和 #57514. items.rawTitle: Diagnostics/OTEL: export logs through bounded diagnostic log events instead of a direct logger transport hook. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: 网关/chat: register chat.send runs 在 the chat run registry so lifecycle 错误 events reach the client 而不是 being 静默地 dropped, fixing stuck 'waiting' state 和 /abort reporting no active run. (#69747) Thanks @wangshu94.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/chat: register chat.send runs in the chat run registry so lifecycle error events reach the client instead of being silently dropped, fixing stuck 'waiting' state and /abort reporting no active run. (#69747) Thanks @wangshu94.

items.title: Cron/exec: suppress automatic background exec completion wakes only 为了 silent cron jobs 使用 `delivery.mode="none"` while keeping Webhook 和 announce runs observable. (#71391) Thanks @goldmar.
items.rawTitle: Cron/exec: suppress automatic background exec completion wakes only for silent cron jobs with `delivery.mode="none"` while keeping webhook and announce runs observable. (#71391) Thanks @goldmar.

items.title: Reply media: 允许 sandboxed replies to deliver OpenClaw-managed `media/outbound` 和 `media/工具-*` attachments 不适用 treating them as sandbox escapes, while keeping alias-escape checks 在 the managed media root. 修复 #71138. Thanks @mayor686, @truffle-dev, 和 @neeravmakwana.
items.rawTitle: Reply media: allow sandboxed replies to deliver OpenClaw-managed `media/outbound` and `media/tool-*` attachments without treating them as sandbox escapes, while keeping alias-escape checks on the managed media root. Fixes #71138. Thanks @mayor686, @truffle-dev, and @neeravmakwana.

items.title: Exec approvals: 允许 bare 命令-name allowlist patterns to match 路径-resolved executable basenames 不适用 trusting `./工具` 或 absolute 路径-selected binaries. 修复 #71315. Thanks @chen-zhang-cs-code 和 @dengluozhang.
items.rawTitle: Exec approvals: allow bare command-name allowlist patterns to match PATH-resolved executable basenames without trusting `./tool` or absolute path-selected binaries. Fixes #71315. Thanks @chen-zhang-cs-code and @dengluozhang.

items.title: Providers/Google: map `/think adaptive` to Gemini dynamic thinking 而不是 a 已修复 medium/high budget, using Gemini 3's provider default 和 Gemini 2.5's `thinkingBudget: -1`. 修复 #71316.
items.rawTitle: Providers/Google: map `/think adaptive` to Gemini dynamic thinking instead of a fixed medium/high budget, using Gemini 3's provider default and Gemini 2.5's `thinkingBudget: -1`. Fixes #71316.

items.title: Control 界面/commands: carry provider-owned thinking 选项 ids/labels 在 session rows 和 defaults so fresh sessions show 和 accept dynamic modes such as `adaptive`, `xhigh`, 和 `max`. 修复 #71269. Thanks @Young-Khalil.
items.rawTitle: Control UI/commands: carry provider-owned thinking option ids/labels in session rows and defaults so fresh sessions show and accept dynamic modes such as `adaptive`, `xhigh`, and `max`. Fixes #71269. Thanks @Young-Khalil.

items.title: Context engine: keep safeguard compaction checks active 之后 context-engine windowing 和 为了 `ownsCompaction` engines, so large transcripts can compact 之前 prompt submission 而不是 waiting 为了 provider overflow. 修复 #71325.
items.rawTitle: Context engine: keep safeguard compaction checks active after context-engine windowing and for `ownsCompaction` engines, so large transcripts can compact before prompt submission instead of waiting for provider overflow. Fixes #71325.
